top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
HAVING COUNT(a.atom_id) > 5
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'O', 'N', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I', 'F')
);

SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id, m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
HAVING COUNT(a.atom_id) > 5
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m2.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m2
    JOIN atom a2 ON m2.molecule_id = a2.molecule_id
    WHERE a2.element IN ('C', 'H', 'N', 'O', 'F', 'P', 'S', 'Cl', 'Br', 'I')
    AND a2.element = 'C'
);
